questionHtml:
What is the pH of 0.01 mol dm−3 KOH (aq)?


A.  1.0

B.  2.0

C.  12.0

D.  13.0

meta.title: What is the pH of 0.01 mol dm−3 KOH (aq)? A. 1.0 B. 2.0 C. 12.0 D. 13.0
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?
Reactivity 3.1.9—The pOH scale describes the [OH–] of a solution. pOH = –log10[OH–]; [OH–] = 10–pOH. Interconvert [H+], [OH–], pH and pOH values.
